case_title: LUIS SEVILLA VS. ARKADY A GELBURT

REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF SEVILLA, LUIS AS TO DEFENDANT GELBURT, ARKADY A AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

NOTICE OF ASSIGNMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY ASSIGNEE CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION INC. DBA GREAT WESTERN COLLECTION BUREAU AS TO PLAINTIFF SEVILLA, LUIS

NOTICE OF MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO POST-JUDGMENT DISCOVERY, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY ASSIGNEE CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION INC. DBA GREAT WESTERN COLLECTION BUREAU HEARING SET FOR APR-12-2007 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 610

DISCOVERY 610, ASSIGNEE CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO POST JUDGMENT DISCOVERY IS GRANTED. MONETARY SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $340 ARE TO BE PAID WITHIN 21 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery
Off Calendar Apr-12-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Assignee Creditors Trade Association's motion to compel responses to post judgment discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to serve complete verified responses to plaintiff's special interrogatories and request for production of documents within 21 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $340 are to be paid within 21 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.
